raw_model_outputs:
<role_action>
{
  "action": "call_role",
  "role": "data_agent",
  "assignment": {
    "objective": "prepare_data_artifacts",
    "task_summary": "Retrieve TEC time series for the specified regions and date range to enable subsequent statistical comparison.",
    "scope": {
      "dataset_ref": "default",
      "regions": ["equatorial_atlantic", "midlat_europe", "highlat_north"],
      "start": "2024-03-01",
      "end": "2024-04-01",
      "task_intent": "compare_regions"
    },
    "deliverables_to_produce": ["series_id"],
    "expected_output_type": "data_artifacts",
    "completion_criteria": "Return role_response when series handles for all three regions are available, or cannot_complete if blocked.",
    "constraints": ["Use only the role contract.", "Do not call other agents."]
  },
  "reason": "No series artifacts exist; data_agent must retrieve the time series for the requested regions and date range before math_agent can compute statistics or comparisons."
}
</role_action>
